name: Sleep Simulator
short_description: Sleep Simulator is a cozy real-time strategy game in which you sleep.
detailed_description:
Sleep Simulator is a cozy real-time strategy game in which you sleep.

- Choose How Long You Want to Sleep.

- Influence the story Of How You Sleep.

- Play the hardcore mode where you are not allowed to wake up.

- Collect successes



"Since I'm currently working on a larger project, I'm also developing smaller games like "Sleep Simulator" on the side. It was just a stupid idea, because I've always joked about simulator games.

it is also a new progress for me since I can't draw the game looks a bit like a children's book and the graphics will change over time.
" - Charly (Dev)
